description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisite: Geisha Clan
The reputation of your clan, as well as your own, spreads easily, and your work and presence are always noted. You gain the following:

  • When you work as a Geisha, you can use a special downtime activity called "Obtain Favors."
    During this time, you assist someone in the city, whether through a guild order or personal choices, and in return, you gain a favor from a person in the area.
    To gain this favor, you must pass your Geisha work DC by at least 5.
    You must decide before rolling whether to sow rumors or gain favors.
    Take note of the location and the person who owes you a favor. Whenever you're in need, you can call in that favor for aid, which could include tools (pills, tools, kits, consumables valued at 50 * proficiency modifier), shelter for a week, assistance with downtime activities (a bonus equal to your Charisma modifier), escape/transport, or other forms of aid at the DM's discretion.
    You can only have your proficiency modifier in active favors, with a maximum of 2 favors per place.
    This activity can be performed instead of Sow Rumors during your Geisha work.

  • Your Geisha work becomes more expensive as you gain more respect. You earn an additional 50 Ryo for every 2 points above the required DC for the rank you chose to perform.
  • Once per downtime, by using 1 week of downtime to perform as a Geisha for someone, you automatically gain 1 favor.
